title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at TVS Supply Chain Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at TVS Supply Chain Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Bhubaneswar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About TVS Supply Chain Solutions:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TVS Supply Chain Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
